Hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade route optimization, fleet management, and real-time monitoring. Self-hosted on your infrastructure. Zero per-driver fees.

Problem.title: ENTERPRISE ROUTING.
Problem.subtitle: The industry charges $35–$80 per driver, per month. We think that's broken. BetterRoute gives you the same capabilities — self-hosted, on your terms.
Problem.annualSavingsEnd: back in your pocket, every year.

Features.title: EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO
Features.subtitle: Built with the same capabilities as enterprise solutions costing thousands per month
Features.routeOptDesc: Powered by VROOM and OSRM engines for real-world distance calculations. Supports vehicle capacity constraints, time windows, and driver skill matching.
Features.orderMgmtDesc: Bulk import orders via CSV or Excel with automatic geocoding. Track every delivery in real time with status updates and photo evidence.
Features.fleetMgmtDesc: Track vehicle capacity, assign drivers, and manage maintenance history from one dashboard. Smart scheduling for peak efficiency.
Features.realtimeDesc: Live GPS tracking with a comprehensive delivery dashboard. Configurable alerts and KPI metrics to keep operations running.
Features.mobileDesc: Native Flutter app for Android and iOS with route visualization and offline mode. GPS tracking, navigation, and evidence capture built in.
Features.rbacDesc: Complete data isolation between organizations with role-based access control. Five built-in roles plus customizable company profiles.

Savings.title: YOUR INFRASTRUCTURE.
Savings.subtitle: No vendor lock-in. No data leaving your servers. No surprises on your invoice.
Savings.card1Desc: Runs on your servers. Your data never leaves your infrastructure — full sovereignty, zero third-party access.
Savings.card2Desc: Fork it, extend it, audit it. Full source code access with a permissive license. No black boxes.
Savings.card3Desc: Standard PostgreSQL database, Docker deployment. Migrate, switch, or modify anytime — you're never trapped.
Savings.savingsCaption: Reinvest in your fleet, not in software licenses.

HowItWorks.title: THREE COMMANDS.
HowItWorks.subtitle: From zero to enterprise-grade route optimization in under 10 minutes.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Clone the repo, configure your environment, and run docker compose up. That's it — your infrastructure is live.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Drag-and-drop CSV or Excel upload. Automatic geocoding, vehicle config, and driver assignment in bulk.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: One-click route optimization via VROOM + OSRM. Real-time GPS tracking and live status dashboards from day one.

TechStack.title: BUILT ON
TechStack.subtitle: Production-grade open-source technologies trusted by millions of developers

CTA.title: READY TO CUT YOUR COSTS BY
CTA.subtitle: Join the growing community of logistics companies saving thousands with open-source route optimization. Deploy on your infrastructure in minutes.
CTA.trustText: Free forever · MIT License · No credit card required
